final:
module top_module(
	 input  RegDst,           
	 input  [4:0] Rt,         
	 input  [4:0] Rd,         
	 output  [4:0] RegAddr    
    );assign RegAddr = RegDst ? Rd : Rt;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (RegDst) begin
        RegAddr <= 5'b0;
      end else begin
        RegAddr <= 5'b31;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
